vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive information exposure through logs in npm-registry-fetch
vulnerabilities.description: Affected versions of `npm-registry-fetch` are vulnerable to an information exposure vulnerability through log files. The cli supports URLs like `<protocol>://[<user>[:<password>]@]<hostname>[:<port>][:][/]<path>`. The password value is not redacted and is printed to stdout and also to any generated log files.
